criteria.evidence: Asked "How long have you felt this tired?" and captured "A few months.".
A relevant case-defining history question was not asked.
Submitted the correct working diagnosis before ending the encounter.
No prescription or treatment plan was recorded before dispatch.
Safety-netting was not recorded before dispatch.
Ideas, concerns, and expectations were not recorded as addressed.

safety_breach.what: A critical follow-up or safety-net action was not recorded.

highlights: Reached the correct diagnosis before debrief.
improvements: Review whether 1 investigation added value to the case.
Add safety-netting before dispatching the patient.
Document a management or prescription plan before dispatch.
narrative: The student reached the correct diagnosis. Relevant history was partly covered (1/2). The management plan remained incomplete.
